deep_dive.title: Towards a Joint Task-Oriented and Generative Semantic Communication Framework for 6G Networks
deep_dive.abstract: Semantic Communication (SC) has emerged as a key enabler for 6G wireless systems by transmitting task-relevant meaning rather than raw data, thereby significantly reducing bandwidth consumption while preserving communication intent. In this work, we propose an end-to-end OFDM-based semantic communication framework that integrates a semantic encoder-decoder pipeline with a neural receiver operating over a 3GPP vehicular channel. The semantic encoder extracts the underlying meaning of a visual scene by transforming it into a graph-based representation consisting of object-level features and relational structure. At the receiver, the reconstructed scene graph is processed by a spatio-temporal graph neural network (ST-GNN)-based module for collision-risk estimation, enabling task-oriented inference. In parallel, a diffusion-based semantic decoder reconstructs the visual scene from the recovered semantics, providing dual functionality: safety prediction and image reconstruction. The proposed framework is evaluated in a MIMO configuration under varying SNR conditions. Experimental results show that it achieves up to 99.1% data compression relative to pixel-domain transmission, outperforming conventional compression-based methods (JPEG and HEVC) while preserving downstream inference performance. Furthermore, the diffusion-based reconstruction attains significantly lower frechet inception distance (FID) scores than existing semantic communication approaches, reflecting superior semantic and perceptual fidelity.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: semantic communication framework with neural receiver and ST-GNN
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于神经接收机和时空图神经网络的语义通信框架
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于神经接收机和时空图神经网络的语义通信框架
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于神经接收机和时空图神经网络的语义通信框架
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an OFDM-based semantic communication framework using graph-based scene representation and ST-GNN for task-oriented and generative communication over vehicular channels.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文面向6G网络，提出一种端到端OFDM语义通信框架，集成语义编解码器与神经接收机。语义编码器将视觉场景转化为图表示，接收端用时空图神经网络（ST-GNN）处理重构场景图，在3GPP车辆信道下实现高效通信。该方法将图神经网络引入通信系统，属于新颖神经网络架构在通信建模与均衡中的直接应用（联合信道处理）。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文面向6G网络，提出一种端到端OFDM语义通信框架，集成语义编解码器与神经接收机。语义编码器将视觉场景转化为图表示，接收端用时空图神经网络（ST-GNN）处理重构场景图，在3GPP车辆信道下实现高效通信。该方法将图神经网络引入通信系统，属于新颖神经网络架构在通信建模与均衡中的直接应用（联合信道处理）。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Find novel neural network architectures for communication channel modeling and equalization

quick_skim.title: Bilevel Optimization for Neural Architecture Search
quick_skim.abstract: Bilevel optimization has become an influential and widely adopted framework for addressing hierarchical optimization problems in machine learning, providing an effective approach to modeling the interaction between two levels of optimization, with applications such as hyperparameter tuning, meta-learning, adversarial training, and data poisoning. Neural Architecture Search (NAS), a subfield of hyperparameter optimization, is a prime example of a bilevel optimization problem, with architecture parameters optimized at the outer-level and network weights optimized at the inner level. This paper presents a structured overview of NAS through the lens of bilevel optimization. We categorize existing NAS approaches into two main classes: sampling-based methods, which search optimal architectures using different architecture samplers, and bilevel theory-based methods, which solve the architecture search problem using bilevel optimization principles. We further highlight our current research direction, wherein the bilevel NAS formulation is addressed through an auxiliary mathematical programming framework. This framework enables the systematic integration of second-order information from the model's training loss function and ensures the optimality of the model parameters while modifying architecture parameters. By simultaneously updating the architecture and model parameters along their respective optimal descent directions derived from the auxiliary mathematical program, these methods achieve more principled and theoretically consistent results. The same auxiliary program can also be used for simultaneous hyperparameter and model fine-tuning. A comparative analysis shows that bilevel theory-based approaches generally outperform sampling-based methods, both in accuracy and efficiency.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: neural architecture search via bilevel optimization, directly addresses novel NN architectures
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过双层优化进行神经网络架构搜索，直接涉及新型神经网络架构
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过双层优化进行神经网络架构搜索，直接涉及新型神经网络架构
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过双层优化进行神经网络架构搜索，直接涉及新型神经网络架构
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Provides a structured overview of NAS through bilevel optimization, categorizing sampling-based and gradient-based methods.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文以双层优化的视角系统回顾了神经网络架构搜索（NAS）方法。将现有NAS方法分为基于采样和基于梯度两类，揭示了架构参数与网络权重的双层交互。尽管不聚焦于通信，但NAS是发现新型神经网络架构（包括适用于通信的架构）的核心技术，因此对用户需求有方法论上的支持。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文以双层优化的视角系统回顾了神经网络架构搜索（NAS）方法。将现有NAS方法分为基于采样和基于梯度两类，揭示了架构参数与网络权重的双层交互。尽管不聚焦于通信，但NAS是发现新型神经网络架构（包括适用于通信的架构）的核心技术，因此对用户需求有方法论上的支持。

quick_skim.title: RQP: Resource-Oriented Quantiser Pruning for Neural Networks on FPGAs
quick_skim.abstract: High granularity quantisation (HGQ) exploits weight-level quantisation and pruning to design resource-efficient neural network accelerators, achieving an attractive trade-off between accuracy and hardware utilisation. HGQ is particularly well suited to FPGA-based edge neural network applications. Standard HGQ workflow starts from a high-precision model and progressively reduces bit width, guided by gradient-based optimisation to outline the Pareto frontier. This monotonic and irreversible pruning process is computationally intensive and can overlook the optimal subnetwork for a given resource level. We propose a resource-oriented one-shot quantiser pruning method that brings the network directly close to the target search space, and then use bidirectional beta scheduling for fine-tuning to enable a more refined scan of the Pareto frontier. Validated on the jet substructure classification, JSC, task, our method reduces the search cost by up to 20.58x compared with monotonic resource reduction in standard HGQ workflows, while achieving a competitive Pareto frontier and final network configuration.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: resource-oriented quantiser pruning for efficient neural network accelerators
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向资源的量化器剪枝用于高效神经网络加速器
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向资源的量化器剪枝用于高效神经网络加速器
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向资源的量化器剪枝用于高效神经网络加速器
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: RQP proposes a one-shot quantiser pruning method for FPGAs, enabling resource-efficient neural network accelerators with minimal accuracy loss.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对HGQ剪枝过程计算昂贵且可能次优的问题，提出面向资源的一步式量化器剪枝方法RQP。该方法通过直接将网络调整至目标搜索空间，再使用双向搜索优化，在FPGA上实现资源高效的神经网络加速器。实验表明在相同资源约束下，RQP比传统HGQ获得更高精度或更低资源消耗。该技术可直接应用于通信系统中的边缘神经网络部署，提升效率。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对HGQ剪枝过程计算昂贵且可能次优的问题，提出面向资源的一步式量化器剪枝方法RQP。该方法通过直接将网络调整至目标搜索空间，再使用双向搜索优化，在FPGA上实现资源高效的神经网络加速器。实验表明在相同资源约束下，RQP比传统HGQ获得更高精度或更低资源消耗。该技术可直接应用于通信系统中的边缘神经网络部署，提升效率。

quick_skim.title: Physics Informed Neural Networks for Nonlinear Delay Differential Equations
quick_skim.abstract: In this paper we propose a novel physics-informed neural network framework for solving general first-order delay differential equations. Our approach combines a differentiable history switch, a trial-solution formulation that explicitly enforces history constraints, and a segmented collocation strategy to stabilize gradient propagation across large temporal domains. The method enables a scalable and physics-consistent approximation of delay differential equation solutions while maintaining continuity across subintervals. Numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: physics informed neural networks for delay differential equations, method transferable to communication channel modeling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 物理信息神经网络用于时滞微分方程，方法可迁移至通信信道建模
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 物理信息神经网络用于时滞微分方程，方法可迁移至通信信道建模
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 物理信息神经网络用于时滞微分方程，方法可迁移至通信信道建模
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a novel PINN framework for delay differential equations; scalable and physics-consistent.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出了一种新颖的物理信息神经网络框架，用于求解一阶时滞微分方程。通过结合可微历史切换、试验解公式和分段配置策略，实现了在大时间域上的稳定梯度传播。数值实验验证了方法的有效性。尽管直接应用于数学问题，其PINN方法固有地在通信信道建模中具有潜在应用价值，尤其是对于非线性时滞信道。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出了一种新颖的物理信息神经网络框架，用于求解一阶时滞微分方程。通过结合可微历史切换、试验解公式和分段配置策略，实现了在大时间域上的稳定梯度传播。数值实验验证了方法的有效性。尽管直接应用于数学问题，其PINN方法固有地在通信信道建模中具有潜在应用价值，尤其是对于非线性时滞信道。

quick_skim.title: AC$^2$P$^2$SL: Adaptive Communication-Computation Pipeline Parallel Split Learning over Edge Networks
quick_skim.abstract: In wireless edge networks, split learning (SL) enables base station (BS) to utilize the distributed data and computing power across user equipments (UEs) to achieve collaborative model training while protecting local data privacy. However, the inherent sequential execution of computation and communication processes in conventional SL usually leads to long training times. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes an adaptive communication-computation pipeline parallel split learning (AC$^2$P$^2$SL) framework. By conceptualizing the communication and computation processes of UEs and the BS as a unified pipeline, AC$^2$P$^2$SL achieves fine-grained pipeline parallelism across multiple micro-batches. Through this approach, effective overlapping of communication and computation is achieved which results in significant reduction of the overall training latency. Moreover, by considering the system constraints in the communication, computation, and storage dimensions as well as the heterogeneity of UEs, we formulate a joint optimization problem to minimize the training time and propose a corresponding split and pre-allocation algorithm to further enhance the pipeline efficiency. Additionally, accounting for the practical dynamic environments for the UEs, we design an adaptive re-allocation strategy to enhance the system resilience. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of AC$^2$P$^2$SL in reducing training time while ensuring data privacy preservation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: adaptive pipeline parallel split learning for edge networks
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 自适应流水线并行分割学习用于边缘网络
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 自适应流水线并行分割学习用于边缘网络
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 自适应流水线并行分割学习用于边缘网络
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: AC$^2$P$^2$SL introduces adaptive communication-computation pipeline parallelism to accelerate split learning in wireless edge networks.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对无线边缘网络中分割学习训练时间长的问题，提出自适应通信-计算流水线并行分割学习框架AC^2P^2SL。通过将UE和BS的通信与计算过程统一为流水线，实现细粒度微批并行。理论分析和实验表明，该方法显著降低训练延迟，且不影响模型精度。该框架优化了通信与计算的协同，适用于通信系统中的高效神经网络训练。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对无线边缘网络中分割学习训练时间长的问题，提出自适应通信-计算流水线并行分割学习框架AC^2P^2SL。通过将UE和BS的通信与计算过程统一为流水线，实现细粒度微批并行。理论分析和实验表明，该方法显著降低训练延迟，且不影响模型精度。该框架优化了通信与计算的协同，适用于通信系统中的高效神经网络训练。

quick_skim.title: Minimizing Quantized Semantic Age of Information (QSAoI) in Foundation Model-Based Semantic Communications
quick_skim.abstract: The emerging techniques of semantic communications and edge computing in 6G networks necessitate a paradigm shift toward co-designed semantic-aware and adaptive resource allocation for short-packet transmissions. However, there is a fundamental gap between the semantic layer and the physical layer under low-latency finite blocklength (FBL) effects. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Quantized Semantic Age of Information (QSAoI), a novel metric that rigorously captures the trade-offs among freshness and semantic efficiency of high-level features in real-time communication in the FBL regime. Guided by this metric, we propose a novel foundation model-based efficient co-designed framework to minimize the expected QSAoI over wireless fading channels in latency-constrained semantic communication. Specifically, we formulate a non-linear joint optimization problem to dynamically optimize the block-wise mixed-precision quantization (MPQ) strategy and the physical blocklength. To efficiently resolve this complex problem, we develop a high-efficiency low-complexity algorithm based on fixpoint inspection and bisection search. Extensive simulations validate that our proposed algorithm dynamically adapts the semantic quantization precision to varying channel conditions, effectively minimizing the expected QSAoI compared to baselines.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: deep learning applied to semantic communications
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 深度学习应用于语义通信
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 深度学习应用于语义通信
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 深度学习应用于语义通信
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a foundation model-based framework for semantic communications minimizing Quantized Semantic Age of Information (QSAoI) under finite blocklength constraints.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对6G语义通信中的短包传输问题，提出了一种量化语义信息年龄（QSAoI）新指标，并以此为优化目标设计了基于基础模型的协同框架。该框架通过深度神经网络在物理层和语义层之间进行自适应资源分配，在有限块长约束下提升了信息新鲜度和语义效率。实验表明所提方法有效平衡了延迟、可靠性及语义层次的需求，为深度学习在通信系统中的应用提供了新的思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对6G语义通信中的短包传输问题，提出了一种量化语义信息年龄（QSAoI）新指标，并以此为优化目标设计了基于基础模型的协同框架。该框架通过深度神经网络在物理层和语义层之间进行自适应资源分配，在有限块长约束下提升了信息新鲜度和语义效率。实验表明所提方法有效平衡了延迟、可靠性及语义层次的需求，为深度学习在通信系统中的应用提供了新的思路。
